nasb.text: The Lord is for me among those who help me; Therefore I will look with satisfaction on those who hate me.

esv.text: The Lord is on my side as my helper; I shall look in triumph on those who hate me.

cnv.text: 耶和華是我的幫助， 我必看見恨我的人遭報。

ccb.text: 耶和华与我同在，帮助我， 我必看见那些恨我的人一败涂地。

csbs.text: 耶和华在我这边，作我的帮助者， 我就会看见那些恨我之人的下场。
